description: This file defines negation in the Present Perfect tense in Njo Viri (Balanda). Present perfect negation expresses actions that have not occurred up to the present moment.

general_principle.statement: Present perfect negation in Balanda is formed by retaining the verb in base form and the present-relevance marker 'dheki', and adding the negation marker 'gba' sentence-finally. The copula 'ma' is not used in present perfect negation.

constraints: The verb must remain in base form
The negation marker 'gba' must appear sentence-final
The copula 'ma' must not be used

aspectual_distinction.rule: The copula 'ma' is used for negation only in continuous forms with 'ti-'.

error_constraints: Do not use 'ma' in present perfect negation
Do not combine present perfect negation with 'ti-'
Do not move 'gba' from sentence-final position

english: I have not eaten fish
She has not drunk water

balanda: Danda teli muru famvara dheki gba
english: We have not slept on the bed
Uku has not gone
Ngande has not come home

balanda: Ndi nonö gbi difo dheki gba
english: They have not walked in the compound
She has not run fast

balanda: Uku mande gbi njü dheki gba
english: Uku has not worked in the garden

balanda: Wiki moliki gbi difo dheki gba
english: The child has not played in the compound
I have not watched the dog

balanda: Ne vele njo balanda dheki gba
english: I have not spoken Balanda
The girl has not written words
I have not read a book
He has not thought about it
They have not known it
I have not asked them

balanda: Ngande vele zi ndi dheki gba
english: Ngande has not told them

balanda: Wilii keye ti naa ni dheki gba
english: The girl has not called her mother
I have not loved you

balanda: Ni maguku ti kpörö dheki gba
english: He has not feared the snake
She has not hated him
Ngande has not surprised him
He has not seemed calm
The girl has not tied the shoe
He has not cut the pot
I have not pulled the door
We have not pushed the box
The girl has not washed the shoe
I have not hidden the beads
Ngande has not built a house
I have not created words
She has not changed the words
I have not turned the door
We have not added money
I have not described Balanda
They have not helped the poor
Ngande has not initiated the project
I have not contributed to the project
The girl has not separated trash
We have not upheld the law
I have not wanted water
She has not given money
I have not found money
Uku has not tried the cloth
Ngande has not left home
I have not arrived in Wau
He has not sharpened the knife
Ngande has not imitated adults
We have not started the project
He has not fallen
